case_title: HKS ARCHITECTS, INC. VS. MENLO CAPITAL GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
